subject: civic
learning_objectives: Identify the categories of human rights
Differentiate between types of human rights

sections.heading: Explanation
sections.content: Human rights are grouped into different categories based on their functions and scope.

sections.heading: Categories
sections.content: Political rights allow participation in governance. Civic rights ensure freedom of expression and association. Social rights enable interaction in society. Cultural rights allow preservation of traditions. Economic rights protect working conditions and welfare.
